function.name: run_sql_query
function.arguments: {"sql": "SELECT Channel, Category, SUM(Sales Amount) AS total_revenue, SUM(Order Quantity) AS units_sold, SUM(Sales Amount) / SUM(Order Quantity) AS revenue_per_unit, AVG(List Price) AS avg_list_price, (AVG(List Price) - Unit Price) / AVG(List Price) * 100 AS realized_discount_pct, SUM(Sales Amount) - SUM(Unit Price * Order Quantity) AS gross_profit, (SUM(Sales Amount) - SUM(Unit Price * Order Quantity)) / SUM(Sales Amount) * 100 AS margin_pct FROM Sales JOIN Sales_Order ON Sales.SalesOrderLineKey = Sales_Order.SalesOrderLineKey JOIN Product ON Sales.ProductKey = Product.ProductKey GROUP BY Channel, Category ORDER BY Channel ASC, total_revenue DESC"}
